task_description: find all image files, group them by resolution category, generate a distribution report, and print the most common resolution

messages.content:
```bash
find . -type f \( -name "*.jpg" -o -name "*.jpeg" -o -name "*.png" -o -name "*.gif" -o -name "*.bmp" \) -print0 | xargs -0 file | grep -E "(image|JPEG|PNG|GIF|BMP)" | head -10
```
